provenance: SYNTHETIC — curated profile x posting cases for the eval harness. Interleaved by profile so a capped run stays diverse.

pairs.screening_question: Describe a time you improved the reliability or latency of a production system.
Describe an experiment you ran that changed a product decision.
How have you grown marketing-sourced pipeline in a B2B SaaS company?
Describe your experience caring for critically ill patients in the ICU.
Why are you interested in working on search infrastructure?
What is your experience with dbt and building tested data models?
Describe how you manage a marketing budget for efficiency.
What is your experience as a charge nurse?
What is your experience building financial or reconciliation systems?
How do you ensure statistical rigor in an A/B test?
What is your approach to lowering customer acquisition cost?
How do you approach precepting new-graduate nurses?
Tell us about your experience leading incident response or on-call.
How do you present analysis to non-technical stakeholders?
How do you build a content and lifecycle program from scratch?
How do you maintain safety and accuracy in medication administration?
How have you improved CI/CD or deployment tooling?
Tell us about a dashboard you built that people actually used.
What is your experience with marketing automation and lead scoring?
Tell us about your experience with medical-surgical nursing.
